mapper.select: SELECT * FROM device_credentials WHERE device_id = #{deviceId} AND active = TRUE AND (expires_at IS NULL OR expires_at > NOW()) ORDER BY issued_at DESC LIMIT 1
mapper.update: UPDATE device_credentials SET active = FALSE WHERE device_id = #{deviceId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO device_credentials (device_id, credential_key, credential_secret_hash, issued_at, expires_at, active) VALUES (#{deviceId}, #{credentialKey}, #{credentialSecretHash}, #{issuedAt}, #{expiresAt}, #{active})
